# WiseCall

WiseCall is an AI receptionist and AI voice agent platform for UK businesses. It answers phone calls, qualifies enquiries, captures structured details, supports booking and escalation workflows, and provides call summaries and transcripts.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://wisecall.io/
- How WiseCall works: https://wisecall.io/how-it-works/
- Pricing: https://wisecall.io/pricing/
- Integrations: https://wisecall.io/integrations/
- Case studies: https://wisecall.io/case-studies/
- Industries hub: https://wisecall.io/industries/
- Dental practices: https://wisecall.io/dental
- Legal and professional services: https://wisecall.io/legal
- Estate agents: https://wisecall.io/property
- AI receptionist UK comparison: https://wisecall.io/compare/ai-receptionist-uk-comparison/
- WiseCall vs Voicemail: https://wisecall.io/compare/wisecall-vs-voicemail/
- WiseCall vs Answering service: https://wisecall.io/compare/wisecall-vs-answering-service/
- Missed call calculator: https://wisecall.io/resources/missed-call-calculator/
- Call transcript guide: https://wisecall.io/resources/call-transcript-guide/
- Missed calls guide: https://wisecall.io/blog/missed-calls-cost-uk-businesses/

## Important positioning

- WiseCall is for UK businesses.
- WiseCall combines AI call answering with a business phone system foundation.
- WiseCall is useful for missed call recovery, out-of-hours call handling, overflow cover, structured caller summaries and team routing.
- WiseCall can be used for out-of-hours cover, overflow cover, or full-time AI call handling.
- WiseCall serves UK service businesses including dental practices, law firms, estate agents, trades and care providers.
- WiseCall handles data in a GDPR-aware way on UK-based infrastructure, with call examples published only in anonymised form.
